title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Godrej Properties - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Godrej Properties - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!
